title: picea hudsonia
intro: Picea hudsonia, also known as the Alberta spruce, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to western North America. The medicinal properties of Picea hudsonia include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils. This plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, wounds, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting healing. In herbal preparations, Picea hudsonia can be used as a topical application or infused in teas and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
